mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_code, name, type, enabled, expire_at, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM tenant WHERE tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT id, tenant_code, name, type, enabled, expire_at, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tenant WHERE tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant (tenant_code, name, type, enabled, expire_at, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantCode}, #{name}, #{type}, #{enabled}, #{expireAt}, FALSE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
